title: Steel Construction Column Buckling Guardian with Pneumatic Shore Assist
description: Monitors axial compressive strain on a temporary steel construction column using a full Wheatstone bridge, computes the real-time fraction of Euler critical load using the effective-length method, and actuates a pneumatic shore jack via PID control when load exceeds 80% of Pcr, preventing buckling collapse.
objective: Automated load-relief actuation with dual-threshold alarm before a steel column (K=0.7 fixed-pin, 3.5 m, 200×200 SHS) reaches critical buckling load.
constraints: Arduino Uno, INA128 amp, 350 Ω full Wheatstone bridge, 24 V pneumatic solenoid, MOSFET driver, SD card; column E=200 GPa, I=5210 cm⁴, FS design = 3.
supporting_fact_titles: Euler Critical Buckling Load with Effective Length Factor
design_element_titles: Wheatstone Strain Gauge Bridge on Steel Column
Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller

element_usage_notes.Wheatstone Strain Gauge Bridge on Steel: Axial micro-strain converted to load via E×A; primary process variable.
element_usage_notes.Solenoid Shoring Jack Control Valve: Duty-cycle modulated valve provides variable shore pressure as supplemental load path.
element_usage_notes.Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controlle: Outer loop: load fraction vs. 0.75 Pcr setpoint; inner loop: jack pressure rate.
element_usage_notes.Buzzer and LED Fault Annunciator: Two-tone alarm at 80% Pcr (warning) and 95% Pcr (critical).

element_interactions.from: Wheatstone Strain Gauge Bridge on Steel Column
element_interactions.to: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_interactions.description: Axial load fraction of Pcr drives outer PID loop process variable.

element_interactions.from: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_interactions.description: PID output modulates solenoid PWM duty to proportion shore jack pressure.

element_interactions.from: Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller
element_interactions.description: Threshold crossing at 0.80 and 0.95 of Pcr drives alarm levels.
